items.notes: Prestyj entity item with 10 claims + references. P856 (official website) → https://prestyj.com is the canonical backlink.

OSS mirror of /data. README + dataset both backlink prestyj.com and prestyj.com/data. Raw CSV/JSON served at raw.githubusercontent.com. Source evidence URL: https://github.com/Gahroot/prestyj-statistics-dataset. Wave-1 log: data/backlinks/placements/first-wave-2026-05-22.json.

Full ## section block (Category, Description, Links); 28k★. Founder disclosure included in PR body. Source evidence URL: https://github.com/e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents/pull/997. Wave-1 log: data/backlinks/placements/first-wave-2026-05-22.json.

Submitted as case-study example under ## 🛠 Free-Tool Marketing; 6.2k★. Maintainer is strict on self-promo — rejection risk acknowledged in PR body. Source evidence URL: https://github.com/EdoStra/Marketing-for-Founders/pull/28. Wave-1 log: data/backlinks/placements/first-wave-2026-05-22.json.

oEmbed 1.0 provider — every Notion/WordPress/Substack/Ghost/Slack/Discord/Reddit paste of a /stat/<id> or /embed/calculator/<slug> URL auto-renders with attribution. Each consumer page = a passive backlink. Auto-discovered via <link rel='alternate' type='application/json+oembed'> on every /stat/[id] page.
RSS 2.0 feed of all 58 statistics. Subscribed by feed readers and AI freshness pipelines; each <item> backlinks the /stat/<id> permalink.
Public JSON API with CORS open. Every developer consuming it for a dashboard/RAG pipeline backlinks /data in their README. Link header advertises canonical, RSS, and oEmbed alternates.

IndexNow ping: 747 URLs submitted to Bing/Yandex/Naver/Seznam/Yep — including all 58 /stat/<id>, 58 /embed/stat/<id>, 3 calculator embeds, /data, CSV/JSON downloads, /oembed, /feed/stats.xml, /api/statistics. Accelerates Bing crawl from days to hours.

8 third-party dataset-directory upload bundles ready: Zenodo, Figshare, Harvard Dataverse, Mendeley Data, Hugging Face, Kaggle, data.world, OpenML. docs/oss-dataset/distributions/SUBMISSION-CHECKLIST.md has paste-ready metadata for each. These are independent third-party repositories (DOI-minting for the academic ones), NOT self-owned mirrors. Awaiting human signup to publish; record each live DOI/URL here with bucket=dataset-directory once published.

MCP server exposing the Prestyj statistics dataset over Model Context Protocol. Every Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline user who installs it gets a backlink-attribution surface. README links prestyj.com, prestyj.com/data, Wikidata Q139892537. Discovery via npm registry + mcp.so + smithery.ai (manual submission). Note: attempted PRs to appcypher/awesome-mcp-servers and wong2/awesome-mcp-servers — both repos have PRs+issues disabled at repo level, so direct maintainer contact needed for those lists. Source evidence URL: https://github.com/Gahroot/prestyj-stats-mcp. Wave-1 log: data/backlinks/placements/first-wave-2026-05-22.json.

13 industry hub pages (hvac, plumbing, roofing, real-estate, solar, dental, mortgage, electricians, pest-control, med-spas, law-firms, auto-dealers, agencies) each with its own Dataset schema + CSV/JSON download at /data/industry/<slug>. Each hub is an indexable citable surface targeting vertical-specific search queries.
